item.title: Gotta Catch Them All! Another Pokemon Dump
item.description:
Imgur app has been wonky these past few weeks and I haven't been able to upload off my phone for some reason. Trying again because this folder is getting overloaded
Luna tax. Our laundry room has turned into her hidey hole for when it rains or there's thunder. She's not pleased

item.title: Baldurs Gate 3 by the numbers
item.dc:creator: GravityVT

item.title: There's a Hut on the Side of the Matterhorn
item.description:
There really is, Built in 1917, for use in emergencies: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solvay_Hut
Doesn't look real.
There's apparently a telephone line. Not a lot of other amenities.
One of the few wooden structures on earth located above the clouds.
Watch your step
It has quite a view
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Dale, What are you going to wear
item.description: This man was a teacher for 40 years. In 1974, Dale Irby, a gym teacher in Dallas, realized he had worn the same outfit as the previous year on Picture Day, and decided to simply go with it, after Cathy – his wife – dared him to. So here you got 40 years with the same outfit until Dale's eventual retirement in 2013.
item.dc:creator: cKittenSmasher

item.title: Visiting the world's first full-scale nuclear reactor. It never produced electricity, it only transmuted uranium into plutonium for the Manhattan Project
item.description: Been a busy little Rad Traveler lately. Trying my best to shoot interesting things, if you're at all curious about Hanford, the Nevada Nuclear Test Site, the Trinity Site, Three Mile Island, or Chornobyl, please check out my post history/gallery :)
item.dc:creator: AtomicAerials

item.title: Missing in Cincinnati, Ohio
item.description: Please share. The Cincinnati police department can be reached at 1-513-765-1212 if you have any information about the whereabouts of these children. Will try to post updates as I find any.

item.title: I found a dead fruit fly in my house
item.description: I didn't want his life to be meaningless so I turned him into a super hero.
item.dc:creator: LegbootLegit

item.title: It should have been me.
item.description: She was the kindest, most thoughtful most selfless person. She leaves behind a young son who won’t remember her and a heartbroken husband who now has to run the farm on his own. She devoted her life to clean living, the church and helping the poor. I mean, come on! Meanwhile, I’m drinking and smoking like a chimney. Nobody needs me and I’d greatly appreciate an early exit. It just makes no sense and there’s nothing to do besides scream into the void.
item.dc:creator: HotBananaBread

item.title: Sharing some positive news with my favorite Imgurians on this tuesday
item.description: Since June I have been struggling, applying for jobs, selling all my belongings, sleeping in my car, lived off of food banks and recycling bottles. Starting January 15 my life will hopefully get a lot easier. The thought of not having to turn every penny to get food makes me want to cry Someone wanted to help, so heres my page https://ko-fi.com/jacobwithl I hope I dont come off as a leeching scumbag for putting it up here. Everything will go towards foods and groceries until the first pay check
item.dc:creator: chickenmangojuice

item.title: Extra wholesome Cake Day dump
item.description:
CAKE DAY!
I think it’s the first time I’ve actually remembered to post.
Have some love and empowerment. My treat.
Know thyself
Love thyself
It takes practice, but it helps
Fluctuations are normal
(see how silly that sounds?)
Do what you can.
And repeat as needed.
Healing takes time.
“The wound is where the light enters” -Rumi
Let yourself be heroic
Let yourself be seen.
Life is supposed to feel good #pelvichealth
You exist. You matter. We are all part of this.
Thanks for the last 8 years, Imgur. Be happy, be well, and be excellent to each other.
item.dc:creator: vikingladywizard

item.dc:creator: Franklin666

item.title: All my Catwoman Cosplays
item.description: SnarkyJayCosplay here to share this updated edit of (almost) all my Catwoman cosplays. Top Row from L to R: Adam Hughes inspired Catwoman with an Arkham twist, Jim Balent (80s) Catwoman, Modern comics Catwoman (mostly inspired by Joelle Jones), Animated Catwoman (from Batman: The Animated Series), Basic Catwoman (a simplified version of the Hughes, this is my earliest one), Cowgirl Catwoman (original concept by me). Bottom Row from L to R: TDKR Catwoman (Hathaway), Wedding Catwoman (from Tom King’s Batman 50), Batman Returns Catwoman (Pfeiffer), Modern Tactical Catwoman (original concept by me, elements from others combined), 2022 Catwoman (Kravitz). I have others (my Christmas Catwoman wasn’t included here) and more ideas in the works. I’m a cat lady IRL, I love black leather, I worship Batman— so Catwoman is the character I identify with the most. I hope it shows!
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum
